tracks.name: Sub Drone
tracks.notes: Low D drone — machine booting. Drift-based, monophonic, long release. The sub-process you can't shut down.

tracks.name: Bass Voice
tracks.notes: D Aeolian grounded bass. Filter closes over track duration. Heavy saturation — Brute Factor analog.

tracks.name: Choir Pads
tracks.notes: Warm choral-analog pad, D minor. Slightly detuned. The sacred voice — present before the machine noise takes over.

tracks.name: Choir Chops
tracks.notes: Angel choir sample drum rack. Triggered as rhythmic events — resequenced by the machine into something wrong.

tracks.name: Harmonic Cloud
tracks.notes: Destabilized harmonic layer. Drift-based, pitch eroding. Rev2 Layer B analog — the optimization function working.

tracks.name: Intelligence Layer
tracks.notes: Harmonic/Modal engine. Microtonal drift — slightly off D Aeolian. The misalignment. Gets louder as track progresses.

tracks.name: Mellow Pad
tracks.notes: Cold neural static. Slow attack, evolving. Intelligence without consciousness.

tracks.name: Neural Static
tracks.notes: Machine noise texture layer. Builds through CONVERGENCE and dominates by ALIGNMENT FAILURE.

tracks.name: Percussion
tracks.notes: Event-based industrial hits. Not groove — system warnings. Meld-based metallic resonance, long decay.
